heading: Cooperation among Mission Directorates
label: 40104 Cooperation among Mission Directorates
text: Research and development activities performed by the Aeronautics Research Mission Directorate with the primary objective of assisting in the development of a flight project in another Mission Directorate shall be funded by the Mission Directorate seeking assistance.
